strengths: 15+ years of polyglot full-stack engineering across web, backend, and embedded systems
Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role (re:cinq)
Strong software craftsmanship discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops, OSS founder
concerns: No demonstrated executive leadership (CTO/VP) or experience scaling teams from 10 to 30+
Lacks production multi-agent AI systems experience at scale; agentic exposure appears recent and tooling-focused
Limited fintech depth — brief RIDE Capital stint, no credit-risk, real-time trading, or regulated AI system ownership

key_factors.factor: Software craftsmanship and polyglot engineering depth

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior individual contributor with broad full-stack and distributed-systems experience and early exposure to agentic AI tooling, but the profile does not match an executive CTO role requiring proven leadership of 30+ engineers, production multi-agent AI architecture, and deep fintech/regulated-environment ownership. Strengths in craftsmanship and breadth are real, but the seniority gap and limited fintech/agentic production depth are material to the role's core requirements.
